Veteran. Conservative. | |
---
**Messner is First-Ever Non-Incumbent to Hit $3M Mark at This Point in Election Cycle**
Corky Messner is the first non-incumbent in the history of New Hampshire elections to have $3 million cash on hand at this point in the election cycle.
“I look at the personal funds I put in as an investment in the people of New Hampshire,” says Corky. "This election is far too important, and since our primary is so close to the general election, we cannot have our nominee enter the final weeks staggering and broke. It is critical our nominee in the general election has enough resources to mount an effective, successful challenge.

"I was honored to receive the endorsement of former New Hampshire House Speaker Bill O’Brien. That endorsement and his faith in our campaign I believe send a strong message that we must unite as a party to defeat career politician Jeanne Shaheen. It is more imperative than ever to return New Hampshire conservative values to the U.S. Senate.”

Corky invested $2 million into his U.S. Senate campaign in March, and $1.21 million of his personal funds at the end of 2019.

At the end of March, incumbent U.S. Senator Jeanne Shaheen reported a record $7.1 million cash on hand.
|
---
**Former O'Brien Supporters and GOP Activist Endorse Messner for U.S. Senate**
Less than a week after former N.H. House Speaker Bill O'Brien dropped out of the Republican U.S. Senate race, a longtime GOP loyalist and five prominent O'Brien supporters have endorsed Corky Messner.

Joining the Messner campaign are committed Republican activist and early 2016 Trump supporter Bruce Breton, who had yet to commit to a Senate candidate; and State Representatives Michael Vose, Jason Osborne, Bob Greene, and Jeff Oligny; and Christopher Maidment, all former O'Brien endorsers.

"I am honored by the trust and the backing of these committed conservatives, as I work to unseat career politician Jeanne Shaheen this fall," says Corky.
|
---
**In the News**
The New Hampshire Union Leader on Sunday, April 6, published a thoughtful op-ed by Corky on passage of the CARES Act and U.S. Senator Jeanne Shaheen’s delay of its approval. As Corky points out,
“Instead of fighting for Granite Staters, defending the bipartisan Senate deal and having the courage to lead, she did what she always does. She went to ground and hid in the fog of Washington, D.C., twice voting no on the Senate deal that she bragged about negotiating. (Incredibly, during one of those no votes, she was featured on C-SPAN laughing on the Senate floor about it.)”

Read Corky’s op-ed **[here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/ec6eef2dc18082bf/5ce32954f4982ac3c3d6b838967d376c/33153)**.
|
---
**Messner Minute: Thanks to O'Brien Supporters**
Corky recently thanked former U.S. Senate candidate Bill O'Brien and his supporters who have contacted the Messner campaign to offer assistance. Working together, we can bring common sense back to the U.S. Senate. **[Click here to view](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/ec6eef2dc18082bf/1f021f90f06271d3c3d6b838967d376c/33153)**.
|
---

name: MJ Hegar
subject: We need to talk about Senator Cornyn
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
I just don't think he understands what Texans are going through right now.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890365/7f51f7bc/4ca7a76c/4ef13ee6/640999191/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | We need to talk about Senator Cornyn, Peter. I just don't think he understands what Texans are going through right now.

He downplayed the threat of COVID-19, and his legislative response has been lackluster at best. At a time when people are losing their jobs and their health care, he's still in favor of gutting the Affordable Care Act. And now he doesn't even want to give Texans the option of voting by mail -- in his own words, if people "can go to the grocery store, they can go to the polls."

**I think Sen. Cornyn 's been in Washington too long. He clearly doesn't get it. Will you help me send him home in November?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890365/7f51f7bc/4ca7a76c/4ef13ee5/640999191/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExOTcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200410.2nd__1197__&amount=5")**
**[Express donate $10>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890365/7f51f7bc/4ca7a76c/4ef13ee4/640999191/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExOTcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200410.2nd__1197__&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890365/7f51f7bc/4ca7a76c/4ef13edb/640999191/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExOTcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200410.2nd__1197__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890365/7f51f7bc/4ca7a76c/4ef13eda/640999191/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExOTcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200410.2nd__1197__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890365/7f51f7bc/4ca7a76c/4ef13ed9/640999191/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExOTcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200410.2nd__1197__")**
Look, I would be thrilled if Sen. Cornyn were doing an amazing job responding to COVID-19. Even though he's my opponent, Texans deserve to have their senator look out for them. But that's not what's happening, and it's unacceptable.

Maybe it's because he's been on government-provided health care for his entire career, but he doesn't seem to understand what it means to lose your job and suddenly be uninsured. And he sure isn't acting like he understands what it's like to have to choose between paying the bills and taking care of a sick kid or to put your health and safety at risk just to carry out your civic duty. I'm a working mom and a combat veteran, so I get it -- **[and I'm asking for your support.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890365/7f51f7bc/4ca7a76c/4ef13ed8/640999191/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExOTcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200410.2nd__1197__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

Peter, if there's anything this crisis has shown us, it's that who we send to Washington _matters_. We need the right person in office who can lead in the good times and the tough times. And Sen. Cornyn just ain't it.

**[Let's send him back to Texas this November. Are you in?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890365/7f51f7bc/4ca7a76c/4ef13ed8/640999191/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExOTcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200410.2nd__1197__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

Thanks,
MJ

**[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890365/7f51f7bc/4ca7a76c/4ef13ed8/640999191/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExOTcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200410.2nd__1197__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890365/7f51f7bc/4ca7a76c/4ef13edf/640999191/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExOTcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1197&amount=10&recurring=true")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890365/7f51f7bc/4ca7a76c/4ef13ede/640999191/VEsHBA/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.

name: Genevieve Collins
subject: Staying at home, but the campaign goes on!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Collins for Texas, Inc
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001REvgHX5_U8K7bbTmrsJAAIeXa7pISBHZG84wrL3bFtcSGuRA5mnEGXjCp18ew78P-Ew14wMQAZii3HyKtIaSkRCksk8AExxYUE5Uh-bOyE9fGzhO0o9w6b0JrNNIQ3c7vV8RKufJKSPh3nknWMDqmazv-76sLix30sV92tOMlRjeLc1QFjHcDQ==&c=311RqUATtKrKtFGT8tHyBUYBlQa0iUadJOEaKT4BQWFUp03fq_9XNQ==&ch=Oua913LagWZ05OP85AwTBoBLMB6l3NQFYd7F2T5alghBbDZlYksUwA==)
---
| Peter,
We are coming to the end of Holy Week. With Palm Sunday, Passover, Good Friday, and Easter all taking place, this has been a very special week for members of the Christian and Jewish faiths.
Despite being stuck at home, a lot is happening on the campaign trail. We released our Q1 fundraising numbers, and even though the last few weeks were unprecedented in our nation's history, we were able to report over $719,000 raised! I'm incredibly humbled by the generosity this community has shown me during these challenging times.
I was recently asked by several college seniors about how to approach entering the job market during a struggling economy. I made the video below to share my thoughts and personal experience graduating college during the 2008 Financial Crisis and Great Recession. Please watch and pass this on to any young people you know who are entering the workforce.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001REvgHX5_U8K7bbTmrsJAAIeXa7pISBHZG84wrL3bFtcSGuRA5mnEGbdLf760K6bMqN2PovarZxRqT6tOXY6phVMK5CcDGeNyZr6WUWK3S0s5pzP_p-k-V_wIhJ-y2iPvMpcIfAZtySLYeq8XtLvtKA==&c=311RqUATtKrKtFGT8tHyBUYBlQa0iUadJOEaKT4BQWFUp03fq_9XNQ==&ch=Oua913LagWZ05OP85AwTBoBLMB6l3NQFYd7F2T5alghBbDZlYksUwA==)
---
| The American spirit is strong, and in times of crisis, we create, we innovate, and we find new ways to thrive as a society and as a nation. I know that we will come out of this stronger than ever.
We can all agree that we owe our healthcare workers a huge debt of gratitude during these tough times. Join me in thanking those who are keeping Texas and our country safe! [Please sign the card](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001REvgHX5_U8K7bbTmrsJAAIeXa7pISBHZG84wrL3bFtcSGuRA5mnEGbdLf760K6bMsJpYd8Ffu_paK29aSHqPhOJF7FZVCLaz6tFhw2iks3OvTWMRBOXeEFbq2u8jUPa05p-2UGQ12ABtP5vepSoUs4UVD1izTXSV&c=311RqUATtKrKtFGT8tHyBUYBlQa0iUadJOEaKT4BQWFUp03fq_9XNQ==&ch=Oua913LagWZ05OP85AwTBoBLMB6l3NQFYd7F2T5alghBbDZlYksUwA==) by following the link below, and we'll pass your message along to the healthcare professionals who are working tirelessly to keep us healthy.

clean_body: | | | | | | == | Peter, We are coming to the end of Holy Week. With Palm Sunday, Passover, Good Friday, and Easter all taking place, this has been a very special week for members of the Christian and Jewish faiths. Despite being stuck at home, a lot is happening on the campaign trail. We released our Q1 fundraising numbers, and even though the last few weeks were unprecedented in our nation's history, we were able to report over $719,000 raised! I'm incredibly humbled by the generosity this community has shown me during these challenging times. I was recently asked by several college seniors about how to approach entering the job market during a struggling economy. I made the video below to share my thoughts and personal experience graduating college during the 2008 Financial Crisis and Great Recession. Please watch and pass this on to any young people you know who are entering the workforce. | == | The American spirit is strong, and in times of crisis, we create, we innovate, and we find new ways to thrive as a society and as a nation. I know that we will come out of this stronger than ever. We can all agree that we owe our healthcare workers a huge debt of gratitude during these tough times. Join me in thanking those who are keeping Texas and our country safe! == by following the link below, and we'll pass your message along to the healthcare professionals who are working tirelessly to keep us healthy. | == | Finally, I donated blood today at Carter BloodCare in Garland. We've got a major shortage of blood right now in our country, so if you are able to go donate, please do so! We all need to be helping each other as much as possible when times are tough. | == | I hope you, your family, and all your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these unprecedented times. If you don't already do so, I encourage you to follow us on social media at the links below to stay up to date with the latest news from our campaign. name: Rep. Dana Criswell
subject: Rep. Dana Criswell calls state officials to protect religious freedom
body:
What new laws do you think the Mississippi legislature should consider?|
---|---
| | |
---
| | [](https://4gzmh.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/rt7CuYBUt5PY3QW-FRmnDBPjll5R_5r5MO65a5LkBLNyGSVZs9iQtWR2C1dvt3y7Kc9KDZCBGgKVIfrvT4JZQMYhaTsU38NoxUiipDYMU-EsioW5RAtlZqjrfdNitw0Rf8fQxr36q236abLBifor0AH77bFISA5spc3nl4DqLNhM82gqD4C0RhLS)
---
| | | |
---
**Rep. Criswell calls on state offcials to protect religions freedom**
| |
---
| | To: Governor Tate Reeves Lt. Gov. Delbert Hoseman Speaker Philip Gunn Secretary of State Michael Watson In response to the COVID-19 emergency Gov. Reeves issued Executive Order Number 1463 on March 24, 2020. In this order Governor Reeves lays out the state's response to prevent the spread of the virus to include closing non-essential businesses and asking citizens to limit their activities. This order also more clearly defined essential businesses to help citizens and local governments gage their response. In the order's description of “Essential Businesses or Operations” it reads, “ Religious entities including religious and faith-based facilities, entities and groups, religious gathering provided that they adhere to the CDC and the Mississippi Department of Health recommendations and guidance to prevent the spread of COVID-19.” Further, the First Amendment of the US Constitution states, “Congress shall make no law respecting an establishment of religion, or prohibiting the free exercise thereof;...” Also, the Mississippi State Constitution states in Article 3, Section 11, “The right of the people peaceably to assemble and petition the government on any subject shall never be impaired.” and in Article 3, Section 18, “No religious test as a qualification for office shall be required; and no preference shall be given by law to any religious sect or mode of worship; but the free enjoyment of all religious sentiments and the different modes of worship shall be held sacred. The rights hereby secured shall not be construed to justify acts of licentiousness injurious to morals or dangerous to the peace and safety of the state, or to exclude the Holy Bible from use in any public school of this state. “ In response to the governor's orders several local governments have issued orders that place additional restrictions on modes of worship that are in clear violation of our state constitution. These orders attempt to outline the method or mode of worship a religious body may use to worship. Church-goers and pastors have been threatened with fines and arrest if they refuse to comply with these unconstitutional orders. The people of Mississippi have willingly complied with 'stay-at-home' orders, businesses have closed their doors even though it means many will fail and small business owners are in danger of losing their entire livelihood and investment. But, to further ask the people of this great state to give up their right to worship God in the manner they desire is beyond any reasonable or legal expectation. There are many Mississippians across our state who have limited or no access to the internet or simply choose to worship in a manner other than online. These citizens are following CDC guidelines by remaining in their personal vehicle and practicing safe distancing and should not be subjected to coercion and intimidation by local politicians and police. There is no more important task of an elected official than that of protecting citizens right to worship without fear. I applaud Governor Reeves for addressing this today on his Facebook page and ask him to monitor the situation in Greenville and across the state. I also ask all state officials to publicly condemn these local orders that prohibit the free exercise of religion and request every elected official demand the citizens of Mississippi be free to worship without threat or fear of arrest. Dana Criswell
---
| |
---
| | | Friends for Dana Criswell
PO Box 1321 Olive Branch, MS 38654
Dana@DanaCriswell.net
---
| | | [](https://4gzmh.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/1MuC3kJj45U1ko2AO3kkDuKw6s0qmzhKxQI9OipjII8Fr1DiTuTyTrK88QcWn9-ipU46rL8Za_0213R2nSBexuSwVTDc5CTMYPWEcSYiv1L_3EhpuvBFUIgM6dAJZDQ1ED_-0-vwm4zLomOzen9kOFYfIQ2V2v7Q5V-PMNhjqkm-YuLVHf1lwITtqpPAbMcpWha_UHMX)

name: Bill Olson
subject: Time to support the President!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=imoa.vvaK_6OuRU&b=rzn2sQd5cMdKm4MYgA9IyQ)
---

Hi Peter,

_My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet running to take back a Swing district - Florida’s 9 th District, currently held by liberal Democrat Darren Soto. _
_As a decorated U.S. Army vet who saw combat in the Middle East, my country- and our freedoms- mean something to me!_

**Along the way, I was recognized for my service: four Army Achievement Medals, the Army Commendation Medal, and two Meritorious Service Medals.**

**I also received an additional Army Commendation Medal for my meritorious service in liberating Kuwait during Operation Desert Shield and Operation Desert Storm, and in 2008 I was awarded the Bronze Star for exceptionally meritorious service during the global war on terror in Afghanistan.**

So you can imagine, being an Army lifer, that serving my country - protecting my country and our freedoms - is a VERY big deal to me!

That said, what I am MOST proud of, is that my passion for serving my country was passed on to my three sons.

I am NOT a career politician.... Just someone who spent most of his adult life, risking my life for your freedom.

_here is nothing I’d rather do - I’m a fighter and I love my country and my fellow citizens!_
Now I want to take that fighting spirit to Congress- and Nancy Pelosi and her band of Socialists don’t stand a chance.

I’m running against a career politician: Democrat Darren Soto.

[I need your help today](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=imoa.vvaK_6OuRU&b=rzn2sQd5cMdKm4MYgA9IyQ) \- to replace Darren Soto, stop the radicals in Congress, stop impeachment and win Florida for the Republicans! Can you help me?

**Liberal Democrat Darren Soto did not serve in the military. Instead, he votes with AOC and her anti-American "Squad" over 95% of the time!**

I think those who have laid the most on the line for our country and its citizens- whose who have taken an Oath to defend the Constitution- are the ones best fit to defend our Constitution in Congress.

_I always knew Darren Soto was bad, but when the Conservative Review Liberty Scorecards came out, we found out just how bad..._

**_Darren Soto got 17% for the last Congress- an "F" rating._**

His score is nearly identical to Speaker Pelosi, because Soto is Nancy Pelosi's lap dog - _he sold his voting card to her a long time ago!_

Soto votes every time to fund Planned Parenthood.

He votes for gun control - every time.

_What really upsets me is that Soto's Democrats went all-in on impeaching the President. They have become SO radicalized, they impeached the President for nothing more than political payback!_

**Time for that to stop!**

Me, I’m not a career politician. I don't have a fancy family pedigree.

I earned my education in the Cold War frontiers of Germany and South Korea, as well as the battlefields of Kuwait, Iraq, and Afghanistan. That's why I'm 100% behind the President's "America First" policies!

**_I’m running to fight for American greatness, American peace, and American pride._**
_I am a Christian conservative_. I believe that when you swear an oath to defend the Constitution, that oath has no expiration date!

Impeachment was never supposed to be a method of resolving our political disputes. It's supposed to be a rare way to remove a President who has committed high crimes.

President Trump is innocent! **And he is a great President and a great American. We must defend him and re-elect him!**

This isn't what the Constitution envisioned. This sad spectacle of partisan revenge is not what America is!

_President Trump is innocent_! We need to make sure the crazy Democrats pay dearly for what they are doing. [And we do that at the ballot box!](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=imoa.vvaK_6OuRU&b=rzn2sQd5cMdKm4MYgA9IyQ)

**And for that, Florida will be key.**

_In 2016, President Trump won by expanding the field, winning in places Republicans hadn't won lately._

The Democrats in 2020 are trying to return the favor- trying to win in Florida.

**__Let's be clear - there is NO Republican win in 2020 without Florida__**.

Florida is so pivotal. The electoral votes, along with so many Republican-leaning and swing congressional districts, make this state of paramount importance.

Plus, it's now President Trump's home state!

**People here have no tolerance for the Dems' impeachment scam. They have no tolerance for the crazy policies and socialism.**

We are red-blooded Americans! Democrats like AOC and her extremism have no place here.
_Me? I'm a working class guy who loves God and my country. I'm 100% behind the President's "America First" policies!_

Perhaps you agree with me, that we need more Bible, more Constitution - _and less crazy liberal Democrats like Darren Soto._

If so, then [I need your help!](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=imoa.vvaK_6OuRU&b=rzn2sQd5cMdKm4MYgA9IyQ)

Darren Soto will have all of Nancy Pelosi's Swamp money. That's why I need your help today- to replace Darren Soto, and support the President!

**[Can you help me?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=imoa.vvaK_6OuRU&b=rzn2sQd5cMdKm4MYgA9IyQ)**

[I need to raise $23,500 before the end of this month](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=imoa.vvaK_6OuRU&b=rzn2sQd5cMdKm4MYgA9IyQ) to let the people of Central Florida know about Soto's liberal record.

clean_body: | | | Hi Peter, My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet running to take back a Swing district - Florida’s 9 th District, currently held by liberal Democrat Darren Soto. As a decorated U.S. Army vet who saw combat in the Middle East, my country- and our freedoms- mean something to me! Along the way, I was recognized for my service: four Army Achievement Medals, the Army Commendation Medal, and two Meritorious Service Medals. I also received an additional Army Commendation Medal for my meritorious service in liberating Kuwait during Operation Desert Shield and Operation Desert Storm, and in 2008 I was awarded the Bronze Star for exceptionally meritorious service during the global war on terror in Afghanistan. So you can imagine, being an Army lifer, that serving my country - protecting my country and our freedoms - is a VERY big deal to me! That said, what I am MOST proud of, is that my passion for serving my country was passed on to my three sons. I am NOT a career politician.... Just someone who spent most of his adult life, risking my life for your freedom. here is nothing I’d rather do - I’m a fighter and I love my country and my fellow citizens! Now I want to take that fighting spirit to Congress- and Nancy Pelosi and her band of Socialists don’t stand a chance. I’m running against a career politician: Democrat Darren Soto. \- to replace Darren Soto, stop the radicals in Congress, stop impeachment and win Florida for the Republicans! Can you help me? Liberal Democrat Darren Soto did not serve in the military. Instead, he votes with AOC and her anti-American "Squad" over 95% of the time! I think those who have laid the most on the line for our country and its citizens- whose who have taken an Oath to defend the Constitution- are the ones best fit to defend our Constitution in Congress. I always knew Darren Soto was bad, but when the Conservative Review Liberty Scorecards came out, we found out just how bad... Darren Soto got 17% for the last Congress- an "F" rating. His score is nearly identical to Speaker Pelosi, because Soto is Nancy Pelosi's lap dog - he sold his voting card to her a long time ago! Soto votes every time to fund Planned Parenthood. He votes for gun control - every time. What really upsets me is that Soto's Democrats went all-in on impeaching the President. They have become SO radicalized, they impeached the President for nothing more than political payback! Time for that to stop! Me, I’m not a career politician. I don't have a fancy family pedigree. I earned my education in the Cold War frontiers of Germany and South Korea, as well as the battlefields of Kuwait, Iraq, and Afghanistan. That's why I'm 100% behind the President's "America First" policies! I’m running to fight for American greatness, American peace, and American pride. I am a Christian conservative. I believe that when you swear an oath to defend the Constitution, that oath has no expiration date! Impeachment was never supposed to be a method of resolving our political disputes. It's supposed to be a rare way to remove a President who has committed high crimes. President Trump is innocent! And he is a great President and a great American. We must defend him and re-elect him! This isn't what the Constitution envisioned. This sad spectacle of partisan revenge is not what America is! President Trump is innocent! We need to make sure the crazy Democrats pay dearly for what they are doing. And for that, Florida will be key. In 2016, President Trump won by expanding the field, winning in places Republicans hadn't won lately. The Democrats in 2020 are trying to return the favor- trying to win in Florida. Let's be clear - there is NO Republican win in 2020 without Florida. Florida is so pivotal. The electoral votes, along with so many Republican-leaning and swing congressional districts, make this state of paramount importance. Plus, it's now President Trump's home state! People here have no tolerance for the Dems' impeachment scam. They have no tolerance for the crazy policies and socialism. We are red-blooded Americans! Democrats like AOC and her extremism have no place here. Me? I'm a working class guy who loves God and my country. I'm 100% behind the President's "America First" policies! Perhaps you agree with me, that we need more Bible, more Constitution - and less crazy liberal Democrats like Darren Soto. If so, then Darren Soto will have all of Nancy Pelosi's Swamp money. That's why I need your help today- to replace Darren Soto, and support the President! to let the people of Central Florida know about Soto's liberal record. of $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1000.... all the way to the Federal maximum donation of $2800 per individual, $5600 per couple? The Democrats are going to lose next year \- but only if we let the American people know what they have done. It's up to us! Let's get this done! Bill Olson Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars Supports President Trump Not a Career Politician Hard Core Conservative Fighter P.S. , so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - you and God bless America! - Bill. PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS Bill Olson is a retired member of the United States Army. name: Tina Smith
subject: Re: Video call
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Hi there — I hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during this difficult time. As we continue to move our campaign operations online, these emails have never been more important. So, I hope you’ll take a moment to read this one. Since we can’t actually sit down and grab a coffee in person, I will be hopping on a virtual call with my team to go over our priorities and strategy for the coming months. But before I do, I wanted to check in with you because it’s important that I get your feedback, too. With everything that’s going on right now, my top priority is making sure this campaign continues to be about you and fighting for your interests in the Senate. I wish I could sit down and grab a coffee with each of you and hear what’s on your mind — but with social distancing orders in place, the next-best way for me to know is by emailing you a few short questions directly. **[Will you take a minute to tell me what issues matter most to you in this race? I want to know what your priorities are and what keeps you up at night, so I really hope you’ll take a moment to fill out my survey today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17107935/182547331/1077134229?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjdlNTA1NS04MDdiLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XDpHp2yrKeP_coWgIfOFXO7UE66GC9C5aV8TupNcsCc=&emci=c57e5055-807b-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=c67e5055-807b-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=6227932)** | [TAKE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17107936/182547332/1077134229?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjdlNTA1NS04MDdiLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XDpHp2yrKeP_coWgIfOFXO7UE66GC9C5aV8TupNcsCc=&emci=c57e5055-807b-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=c67e5055-807b-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=6227932)
---
My parents had always raised me to believe that to be a true part of your community, it’s not enough just to keep your lawn nice or say “Hi!” at the grocery store. You need to actually listen to each other and work together to solve problems.
You know, most people who have never been to Minnesota remember us for our weather. But Minnesotans are better known for listening to each other. Even when they disagree, folks are willing to respect each others’ opinions.
As I have always seen it, if you really listen to people, you’ll find everybody has a story worth hearing. Everybody has a problem worth working to solve. And when it comes to making big decisions as a community, everyone deserves a seat at the table.
**[So, I’m asking you to join me at the table. Help me do a better job of answering to folks like you during this election by filling out my quick priorities survey. Your feedback is important to me.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17107937/182547333/1077134229?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNjdlNTA1NS04MDdiLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XDpHp2yrKeP_coWgIfOFXO7UE66GC9C5aV8TupNcsCc=&emci=c57e5055-807b-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=c67e5055-807b-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=6227932)**

clean_body: | Hi there — I hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during this difficult time. As we continue to move our campaign operations online, these emails have never been more important. So, I hope you’ll take a moment to read this one. Since we can’t actually sit down and grab a coffee in person, I will be hopping on a virtual call with my team to go over our priorities and strategy for the coming months. But before I do, I wanted to check in with you because it’s important that I get your feedback, too. With everything that’s going on right now, my top priority is making sure this campaign continues to be about you and fighting for your interests in the Senate. I wish I could sit down and grab a coffee with each of you and hear what’s on your mind — but with social distancing orders in place, the next-best way for me to know is by emailing you a few short questions directly. | My parents had always raised me to believe that to be a true part of your community, it’s not enough just to keep your lawn nice or say “Hi!” at the grocery store. You need to actually listen to each other and work together to solve problems. You know, most people who have never been to Minnesota remember us for our weather. But Minnesotans are better known for listening to each other. Even when they disagree, folks are willing to respect each others’ opinions. As I have always seen it, if you really listen to people, you’ll find everybody has a story worth hearing. Everybody has a problem worth working to solve. And when it comes to making big decisions as a community, everyone deserves a seat at the table. Thanks for weighing in, I’ll be in touch soon. — Tina Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

subject: Unhinged...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stars & Stripes Forever PAC
body:
Peter, they're coming after Trump with everything they've got... * | | |
A message from...
---
John Philip Sousa IV
National Chairman of Stars and Stripes Forever PAC
Formerly the 2016 Committee and National Draft Ben Carson for President Committee
Dear Peter, I trust you are being safe and are doing well in the midst of this pandemic. However, the Democrats are once again becoming "**Unhinged** " regarding COVID-19 and placing any blame they can on President Trump. Stars and Stripes Forever PAC's board member, Chuck Muth, summed it up quite simply in his March 30th newsletter called "Muth's Truths"...
---
[](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=ShrNvf&mc=9J&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EEx6GnM&) [](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=ShrNvf&mc=9J&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EBxUZd&) [](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=ShrNvf&mc=9J&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EMzmFgr&)
---
The Democrats will stop at nothing to defeat President Trump. They impeached him... He was acquitted. Now they are trying to blame him for not handling the Coronavirus effectively and hold him responsible for the tragic deaths of our fellow Americans. **We must continue to fight against their lies and hatred to make sure that President Trump is re-elected. Our country's future depends on it!** [Please donate immediately](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=ShrNvf&mc=9J&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=ECLhSOE&) to keep our ads on the air in Alabama, California, Iowa, Maine, Michigan, Minnesota and New Mexico --- all carefully selected for high percentage of minority voters, a battleground state, and/or to defeat a radical socialist who hates America! Peter, if we're going to win in November... WE MUST STAY ON THE AIR AND EXPAND INTO OTHER BATTLEGROUND STATES IMMEDIATELY! [](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=ShrNvf&mc=9J&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EBKYwqE&)"Mini Mike" Bloomberg just donated **$18 Million** to the DNC to help them defeat President Trump and has pledged to spend a total of **$2 BILLION** against him... Frankly, his money would be better spent helping out his state and fellow New Yorkers that have been hit so hard with the virus. But it seems he hates Donald Trump more than he loves his fellow man. Despicable to say the least. And now that Bernie is out, Sleepy Joe will get huge influxes of cold, hard cash! [Please, Peter, donate today to keep us on the air, dispelling the Liberals' Lies and fighting for President Trump.](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=ShrNvf&mc=9J&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&z=EzS1wx9&) Stay safe. Stay well. United together as caring Americans, we'll get through this and be all the stronger from what we learned. It's who we are... | | _Urgently,_

John Philip Sousa IV
_National Chairman, Stars & Stripes Forever PAC_

name: Team Georgette
subject: We were outspent 3 to 1.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgette Gomez for Congress
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17108017/182553420/1001356148?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Y2JmZWRjZC04MjdiLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hvHGlRres-TWu2ZnZmCfJPvuZKgT7UfJjB8Bzul954k=&emci=8bbfedcd-827b-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=8cbfedcd-827b-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=8780864)
_We know this is a difficult time. Please take care of yourself and loved ones, and only consider donating to the campaign if you’re in a position to do so financially. All my best, - Georgette_
* * *

Friend \--

Grassroots. It’s a word that gets thrown around a lot in politics, but what does a true grassroots candidate for Congress actually look like?

One thing it means for Team Georgette is that we’re people-powered, and won't take any contributions from corporate PACs. Georgette strongly believes that if we're going to level the playing field for working families, then we can't rely on money with corporate strings attached.

**But that means we don't have much of a cushion to fall back on when times are unexpectedly tough like they are right now. As you know, we've had to pause all of Georgette’s in person events -- including our fundraisers.**

No matter how you cut it, online contributions -- on emails just like this one -- are going to play an enormous role in our efforts to win this seat. **[ So today, we're humbly asking if you can make a grassroots contribution of $3 to help us elect a grassroots progressive in CA-53.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17108018/182553421/1147193815?refcode=em-200410-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Y2JmZWRjZC04MjdiLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hvHGlRres-TWu2ZnZmCfJPvuZKgT7UfJjB8Bzul954k=)**
**[DONATE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gomez-q2-2020?refcode=em-200410-all-b)** A fundraising dip can be especially detrimental in our race.

**In our primary election, we were outspent by a 3:1 margin by our self-funding opponent and a super PAC that formed to support her. We're expecting more of the same in the General Election.**

The truth is, money isn’t everything -- but it does matter. And every dollar we raise increases our ability to share Georgette's positive message. We really don't want to rollback our paid outreach efforts due to a cash shortage. So we’ve got to ask:

**[If you’re financially able, please help Georgette close the spending gap to get her progressive message out. Anything you can contribute today will go a long way.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17108019/182553422/1147193815?refcode=em-200410-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Y2JmZWRjZC04MjdiLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hvHGlRres-TWu2ZnZmCfJPvuZKgT7UfJjB8Bzul954k=)
**[DONATE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gomez-q2-2020?refcode=em-200410-all-b)**** Thanks for your support, and stay safe.

_Team Georgette_

---
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17108020/182553423/1001356148?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Y2JmZWRjZC04MjdiLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hvHGlRres-TWu2ZnZmCfJPvuZKgT7UfJjB8Bzul954k=&emci=8bbfedcd-827b-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=8cbfedcd-827b-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=8780864) Georgette Gómez is the first LGBTQ Latina elected San Diego City Council President. Now, she's running for Congress to stand up to Trump’s dangerous agenda and recenter our focus on working families in our community.

_**Georgette is the only candidate in the race for CA-53 to be endorsed by the California Democratic Party.**_ Email is the best way to stay up to date with Georgette's campaign. To support Georgette's campaign please [make a donation here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17108021/182553424/1147193815?refcode=em-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Y2JmZWRjZC04MjdiLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hvHGlRres-TWu2ZnZmCfJPvuZKgT7UfJjB8Bzul954k=). Thank you for supporting Georgette! Paid for by Georgette Gomez for Congress

name: Charles Booker
subject: Not today, Satan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Mitch is (once again) exploiting faith by saying COVID-19 efforts to keep Kentuckians safe this Easter weekend threaten religious liberty. He’s undermining the policies that are saving hundreds if not thousands of lives in the name of religion.
#
I’m sick and tired of watching Mitch McConnell play political games while people are dying from a crisis.
**Mitch is (once again) pandering to his religious conservative base by saying COVID-19 efforts to keep Kentuckians safe this Easter weekend threaten religious liberty.** He’s undermining our local leaders’ efforts to save hundreds if not thousands of lives for the sake of a cheap political stunt. _Not today, Satan. _
Kentucky deserves better. **You deserve better****.**
**[If you agree, will you chip in $5 to support our grassroots campaign to defeat Mitch and then read about the latest example of Mitch’s recklessness?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17108112/182559333/1342823177?refcode=em20200410-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMGEyODg5OS04NTdiLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zaxhl865WUTxvhDL94xvU7t4XTGKXolw0FPksJyTamI=)**
****[Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17108113/182559334/1342823177?refcode=em20200410-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMGEyODg5OS04NTdiLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zaxhl865WUTxvhDL94xvU7t4XTGKXolw0FPksJyTamI=)****
Many aspects of our lives have been put on pause — but it’s the sacrifice we must make in order to protect the lives of our neighbors, family members, and friends.
So when I see Mitch McConnell downplay the severity of the pandemic and undermine efforts to control the virus to pander to his base, **it upsets me. **
Governor Beshear, Mayor Fischer, and local leaders across Kentucky have been working around the clock to flatten the curve and save lives during this pandemic. Instead of respecting their hard work, Mitch McConnell is attacking the life-saving social distancing rules they created and demanding local leaders to allow drive-in church services this weekend. **It’s irresponsible political pandering, and it will likely lead to more Kentuckians contracting COVID-19, and more Kentuckians dying. **
This is what Mitch would rather do than work on passing COVID-19 relief efforts to help small businesses and assist the record number of unemployed people across our country. It comes down to the fact that Mitch doesn’t care about helping people as much as promoting his own image.
**[It’s shameful. I’m reminded why we’re fighting so hard this election season. If you’re as angry as me, will you chip in $5 to help us build the grassroots movement we need to defeat Mitch?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17108127/182559375/1342823177?refcode=em20200410-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMGEyODg5OS04NTdiLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zaxhl865WUTxvhDL94xvU7t4XTGKXolw0FPksJyTamI=)**
****[Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17108128/182559376/1342823177?refcode=em20200410-2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMGEyODg5OS04NTdiLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zaxhl865WUTxvhDL94xvU7t4XTGKXolw0FPksJyTamI=)****
Together,

clean_body: Mitch is (once again) exploiting faith by saying COVID-19 efforts to keep Kentuckians safe this Easter weekend threaten religious liberty. He’s undermining the policies that are saving hundreds if not thousands of lives in the name of religion. I’m sick and tired of watching Mitch McConnell play political games while people are dying from a crisis. Mitch is (once again) pandering to his religious conservative base by saying COVID-19 efforts to keep Kentuckians safe this Easter weekend threaten religious liberty. He’s undermining our local leaders’ efforts to save hundreds if not thousands of lives for the sake of a cheap political stunt. Not today, Satan. Kentucky deserves better. You deserve better. = **= Many aspects of our lives have been put on pause — but it’s the sacrifice we must make in order to protect the lives of our neighbors, family members, and friends. So when I see Mitch McConnell downplay the severity of the pandemic and undermine efforts to control the virus to pander to his base, it upsets me. Governor Beshear, Mayor Fischer, and local leaders across Kentucky have been working around the clock to flatten the curve and save lives during this pandemic. Instead of respecting their hard work, Mitch McConnell is attacking the life-saving social distancing rules they created and demanding local leaders to allow drive-in church services this weekend. It’s irresponsible political pandering, and it will likely lead to more Kentuckians contracting COVID-19, and more Kentuckians dying. This is what Mitch would rather do than work on passing COVID-19 relief efforts to help small businesses and assist the record number of unemployed people across our country. It comes down to the fact that Mitch doesn’t care about helping people as much as promoting his own image. = = Together, Charles =** | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

body:

| | Peter --

**BOTH Larry Sabato's Crystal Ball and Cook Political Report just changed our race rating from _Lean Democratic_ to _Toss-Up_.**

Right now, voters in our district are just _days away_ from receiving their ballots in the mailbox -- which means people will be starting to make their decision about who they want to be our district's voice in Congress.

With the outcome of this race more uncertain than ever, we need to make sure the whole district knows that Christy is the right choice -- **and that's why we have a _huge_ fundraising goal of $100,000 online by Saturday night.**

**[Voters will start receiving their ballots next week, and we need all of the resources we can get to show how Christy is the right leader. Can you help us meet our goal by pitching in $5 or anything you can today?](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8ae/29776869/a03bfca/569f40c6/3976714591/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MTBfdmJtZ29hbDEtZnVsbCJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200410_vbmgoal1-full")** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8ae/29776869/a03bfca/569f40c7/3976714591/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MTBfdmJtZ29hbDEtZnVsbCJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200410_vbmgoal1-full&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $25](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8ae/29776869/a03bfca/569f40c0/3976714591/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MTBfdmJtZ29hbDEtZnVsbCJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200410_vbmgoal1-full&express_lane=true&amount=25")

Republican special interests are ramping up their spending in ways we never imagined... which means we have to step up, too. They just added another $90,000 to their TV ad buys.

They are desperately trying to flip this seat in their quest to take back the House. Let's show them that there's no chance of that happening -- starting with us winning our seat on May 12th.

**[We really need you, Peter. If you make a contribution now, you'll get us one step closer to meeting our online fundraising goal of $100,000 by Saturday night and winning this Toss-Up race.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b8ae/29776869/a03bfca/569f40c6/3976714591/VEsO/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MTBfdmJtZ29hbDEtZnVsbCJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200410_vbmgoal1-full")**

Thanks for stepping up. We appreciate your help, and we hope you and your loved ones are safe at this time.

\-- Lexie

Lexie Kelly
Finance Director

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: We are beating this virus. Keep up the fight!
body:
Thanks to the selflessness and patriotism of Americans who have rallied behind President Trump’s Coronavirus Guidelines we are slowing the spread... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1c074fabba&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • April 10, 2020
---
| | |
# **We are beating this virus. Keep up the fight!**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=78c2c138b0&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **Thanks to the selflessness** and patriotism of Americans who have rallied behind [President Trump’s Coronavirus Guidelines](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=668f609c84&e=3ee4985eea), we are slowing the spread of disease and saving many, many lives.

**The President’s** guidelines called for 30 days of mitigation efforts, which continue through the end of April. According to health experts, these actions are paying off.

**“What we **have been doing has been working,” Dr. Anthony Fauci said this week. “So the call that I say every time I get to this podium is, ‘Just keep it up,’ because this is going to get us out of it. This is our best and only great public health tool.”

**When more people** protect themselves and stay healthy, more space frees up in our hospitals to treat the sick. When more people socially distance themselves and follow President Trump’s guidelines, more time is bought to develop safe, effective treatments.

**Keep up the fight!** The more we all do now, the sooner we’ll beat this invisible enemy.
* **🎬** **Our best weapon:** [Stay 6 feet away from the nearest person](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=62914590e5&e=3ee4985eea "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8p0u-d4f604&feature=youtu.be")

* 🎬 **Avoid large groups:** [Anyone can become a carrier of disease](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f69e82845f&e=3ee4985eea "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=uVKLDZ3lezw")

* 🎬 **Take care of yourself:** [Get enough sleep, exercise, and call a friend ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e7baac181b&e=3ee4985eea "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ER3jCl-zKp8")

* 🎬 **Vice President Pence:** [Americans’ diligence is paying off!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=da7e8d6f30&e=3ee4985eea)

---
|
---
|
# **President Trump participates in Easter blessing**
---
| **On Good Friday,** Christians around the world pause to remember Jesus’ suffering and death upon the Cross. On Sunday, they’ll celebrate his glorious Resurrection.

**As America battles** the deadly Coronavirus, there are some changes this year to the way we must honor this holy occasion.

**🎬****President Trump:** [Americans believe in the power of prayer](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ec38c9611b&e=3ee4985eea)

**“Though we will not** be able to gather together with one another as we normally would on Easter, we can use this sacred time to focus on prayer, reflection, and growing in our personal relationship with God,” President Trump said from the Oval Office.

**“I ask all Americans** to pray that God will heal our nation; to bring comfort to those who are grieving; to give strength to the doctors, nurses, and healthcare workers; to restore health to the sick; and to renew the hope in every person who is suffering.”

[Watch Bishop Harry Jackson deliver the Easter blessing.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e8b8f6daa7&e=3ee4985eea)
---

name: Booker HQ
subject: Expanding vote-by-mail
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CORY BOOKER FOR SENATE
body:
Voters should be able to participate in our democracy without having to risk their health. |
#
Friends, What happened in Wisconsin this past week should outrage us all. In the midst of an unprecedented global health crisis, Republican lawmakers and judges refused to push back Tuesday's election, extend absentee voting, or institute far-reaching vote-by-mail measures to ensure voters had a safe way to exercise their constitutional right to participate in our democracy. As a result, thousands of voters in Wisconsin were forced to make an unacceptable choice: risk their health by going to the polls or don't vote at all. In Milwaukee, voters waited for hours in long lines to cast their ballots because the number of polling locations in the city decreased from 180 to only five polling locations in this past week's election. This is what voter suppression looks like, friend. **Now more than ever we need to rededicate ourselves to the fight to protect our right to vote. That 's why Cory has been a tireless advocate for expanding vote-by-mail during this critical election year.** [**Will you add your name to this petition asking Congress, governors, and local officials to work together to expand vote-by-mail across the country and implement safe voting practices?**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/expand-vote-by-mail?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&City=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bookerlive&utm_content=1+-+Will+you+add+your+name+to+this+petition+&utm_campaign=em200410&source=em200410") | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/expand-vote-by-mail?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&City=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bookerlive&utm_content=2+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em200410&source=em200410")
---
We cannot let what happened in Wisconsin this week happen again in any other state with an upcoming primary -- or the general election in November.
We need to make a plan and start implementing it soon to ensure that voters and their ability to safely cast their vote are both protected for as long as the threat of the coronavirus hangs over this election.
Thanks for taking action on this today. We need your voice in this fight.
Booker HQ

name: Tiffany Shedd
subject: THANK YOU to our local heroes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tiffany Shedd for Congress Committee
body:
Friends, Over the past few weeks, we’ve seen countless examples of the bravery and dedication of our local heroes as they respond to the rise of coronavirus. I’m so thankful for those essential workers on the frontlines who are keeping the wheels turning for our community and country. This is why I wanted to ask if you, friend, would join me in thanking **our nurses, doctors, delivery truck drivers, post office workers, pharmacists, grocery store workers, and so many others.** Every single person in these positions has stepped up to work against the threat of the coronavirus so the rest of us can stay safe and healthy. name: Laura Loomer
subject: Our shared Passover
body:
This will be a tough Passover and Easter for all Americans. We won’t be gathering in our houses of worship.
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-371534-872993-4950496-fd85c8f145-329c39ae34)
Patriot,

This will be a tough Passover and Easter for all Americans.

We won’t be gathering in our houses of worship.

Many of us won’t be traveling to share time with our loved ones.

Some of us will be struggling to feed our families.

All of us are in fear for ourselves our families, our communities, and our nation.

**But our faith tells us that this will pass.**

In 1314 BCE, Moses dictated God’s sacrifice required from the Israelites so that the plagues of Egypt would pass over their homes and protect them.

It was a terrifying time that required extreme faith, but the Israelites complied with God’s order and freed themselves from slavery.

Today, our sacrifices are different, but our faith remains the same.

We all know this will pass, but it’s up to us to choose our path as a nation.

When this is all over, there will be two distinct directions to take: socialism and government control, or maintain the path of liberty.

Will we do the opposite of the Israelites and embrace the slavery of socialism in the hopes it will save us, or will we show our resolve as individuals and our faith in God and in each other and choose to work our way out of this pandemic and economic hardship?

I choose to put in the work and will do whatever it takes for our community to come out stronger than ever while maintaining our freedoms.

Government has proven it can’t protect us from every threat, and no matter what promises the Democrats make or the burden of debt they place us under, it’s up to us to lift ourselves up back to prosperity.

So have faith in God, have faith in yourself and in each other, and CELEBRATE Passover and Easter knowing without question that we will get through this.

In the coming days I wish you and your family a happy Passover and a happy Easter and I will see you on the other side, eager to help rebuild our nation.

With respect and gratitude,

Laura Loomer

name: Team Collins
subject: Senator Collins is Fighting for Employees of Maine's Small Businesses
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Collins for Senator
body:
We hope you have seen a new video focused on Senator Collins's efforts to fight for employees of small businesses affected by coronavirus.The hundreds of thousands of workers at Maine's small businesses, like Simones' Hot Dog Stand in Lewiston, are the backbone of Maine's economy, but they are struggling as a result of this pandemic.
To unsubscribe click [here](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=18&ms=NDIyMzYwNjkS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MTE1MTA0MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=NDIyMzYwNjkS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MTE1MTA0MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)[****](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=20&ms=NDIyMzYwNjkS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MTE1MTA0MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Friends,
We hope you have seen [**a new video**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=21&ms=NDIyMzYwNjkS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MTE1MTA0MgS2&mt=1&rt=0) focused on Senator Collins's efforts to fight for employees of small businesses affected by coronavirus.

[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=NDIyMzYwNjkS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MTE1MTA0MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
_Click the image to view the video_
The hundreds of thousands of workers at Maine's small businesses, like Simones' Hot Dog Stand in Lewiston, are the backbone of Maine's economy, but they are struggling as a result of this pandemic.
Today, like so many small businesses, the restaurant sits empty - because owners Jimmy and Linda Simones were forced to make the heartbreaking decision to close and to lay off their dedicated staff until this health crisis is over.
[**Please take a look at the video, which highlights the federal efforts Senator Collins led to provide emergency economic relief to all of these workers and the businesses who employ them.**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=NDIyMzYwNjkS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MTE1MTA0MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Senator Collins joined with a bipartisan group of her Senate colleagues to create the new Paycheck Protection Program, which is providing $350 billion in forgivable loans to small businesses to help them survive this current crisis and, importantly, helping keep their workers on the payroll.
The _Portland Press Herald_ reported this weekend that in the first three days of the new program,[**more than 1,000 Maine businesses and their employees were helped**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=NDIyMzYwNjkS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MTE1MTA0MgS2&mt=1&rt=0), and in a follow-up story, [**the paper reported**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=NDIyMzYwNjkS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MTE1MTA0MgS2&mt=1&rt=0) that more than 1,800 Maine businesses had been approved for more than $500 million in loans early this week.
We also want to express our deep appreciation for your patience and willingness to help each other during this time. Stay safe.
Team Collins

[SusanCollins.com](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=NDIyMzYwNjkS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MTE1MTA0MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=NDIyMzYwNjkS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MTE1MTA0MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)

This cannot happen.

Our postal workers are on the front lines -- they're working tirelessly to deliver life-saving supplies during this crisis.

We MUST come together to protect these workers' jobs and livelihoods.

[**We need a MASSIVE outcry of support to demand immediate, emergency funding for the post office.**](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b1ec/18e32a7f/4f16bc08/7b221287/1522365369/VEsB/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/post-office-survey?source=20200410_em_pet_b1_poav_ia")

[_**BEFORE MIDNIGHT: Will you sign our emergency petition to SAVE the post office during this critical time? Ben Ray needs 20,000 signatures strong before midnight. >>**_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b1ec/18e32a7f/4f16bc08/7b221287/1522365369/VEsO/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/post-office-survey?source=20200410_em_pet_b1_poav_ia")

Thank you,

Team Ben Ray

Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement? **[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6b1ec/18e32a7f/4f16bc08/7b2212bb/1522365369/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. name: MJ Hegar Senior Staff
subject: What's at stake in this election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
If he's reelected, Senator Cornyn WILL try to gut our health care again.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489039f/7f51f7bc/4cb87a8f/4ef121d5/645272004/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Especially now, health care is at the front of every Texan's mind. Look Peter, if he's reelected, Senator Cornyn WILL try to gut our health care again. He's already voted to repeal the Affordable Care Act **_20 times!_ [Can we count on you to help protect our health care by pitching in to help MJ defeat Senator Cornyn?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489039f/7f51f7bc/4cb87a8f/4ef121d4/645272004/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExODkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200410.3nd__1189__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

**Senator Cornyn has made it clear he wants to gut protections for people with pre-existing conditions -- putting nearly 5 million Texans at risk of losing their coverage.** He supported a reckless lawsuit to strike down the _entire_ Affordable Care Act and increase costs for Texans who need coverage most. We've got to stop him, and MJ is the person to do it.

As a combat veteran who took gunfire during her service and as a working mother who went through two difficult pregnancies, MJ understands just how important healthcare access is. **She flew medevac rescue missions in Afghanistan, standing by her team to make sure wounded soldiers got the medical care they needed --[now she needs your help to make quality, affordable health care available for all Texans.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489039f/7f51f7bc/4cb87a8f/4ef121d4/645272004/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExODkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200410.3nd__1189__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

If we work together, we can beat Senator Cornyn and his allies in Big Pharma and the insurance industry to make sure all Texans have the health care they need. Here are a few key reasons it's so important to win in November:
* **Senator Cornyn voted against a bill to lower prescription drug costs.**
* **He voted to allow insurance companies to charge older Texans up to five times more for coverage.**
* **He supported a lawsuit that would strike down the entire ACA, including protections for people with pre-existing conditions!**

**[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489039f/7f51f7bc/4cb87a8f/4ef121d4/645272004/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExODkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200410.3nd__1189__&amount=10&recurring=true")** **Sen. Cornyn may have dark money in his corner, but MJ has _you_ \-- let's expand all Texans' access to healthcare. Rush a donation now to help MJ beat Sen. Cornyn in November!** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---

**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489039f/7f51f7bc/4cb87a8f/4ef121cf/645272004/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExODkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200410.3nd__1189__")**

**[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489039f/7f51f7bc/4cb87a8f/4ef121d4/645272004/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjExODkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200410.3nd__1189__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: Good news on Good Friday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
We are well on our way to recovery. | | |
---|---|---
Friend,

During his daily update today, Governor Holcomb outlined the steps he’s taking to ensure Indiana’s economic recovery is swift and that Hoosiers can quickly return to work.

_**We’re not out of the woods yet.**_ Governor Holcomb reminded us today, we’re just at the front end of a COVID-19 surge. We need to _**stay hunkered down**_ and keep practicing social distancing so we can continue to slow the spread and flatten the curve.

However, we will get through this. _**And we’ll get through it together.**_

Indiana is receiving disaster recovery funds from three federal relief packages. Here’s how the state is using these funds to accelerate the Hoosier recovery:

_**Coronavirus Preparedness and Response Supplemental Appropriations Act:**_
* Indiana will receive approximately $10.6 million.
* Primary focus is public health and emergency preparedness, including personal protective equipment.

_**Families First Coronavirus Response Act:**_
* Focused mainly on helping individuals.
* Eases guidelines for food programs such as Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP).
* Expanded individual eligibility for unemployment insurance.
* Provided for emergency sick and family medical leave for those impacted by COVID-19.

_**Coronavirus Aid, Relief, and Economic Security (CARES) Act.**_
* Indiana will receive over $3 billion from CARES Act.
* $250 million will bolster existing programs, including:
* Funds for unemployment insurance relief.
* Emergency food and WIC programs.
* Block grants for community development and housing assistance.
* CARES Act Education Stabilization Fund: $500 million.
* CARES Act Coronavirus Relief Fund: $2.4 billion

The governor also announced today the creation of _**Indiana’s Economic Relief & Recovery**_ team to administer these federal recovery programs. This team will work hard to plan, administer and account for all Indiana relief funds – _**making sure they’re getting to Hoosiers who need help.**_

Governor Holcomb is taking these actions now so we can guide _**Indiana’s return to full economic activity**_ in a safe way, preparing to adapt operations in a post-COVID-19 Indiana.

Fitting for this Easter weekend, the governor said _**“The world will wake up again. We will rise again.”** _And we’re well on our way.

#INThisTogether,
-Your Holcomb Crew
---
---
|
|
| |
---
